message:
feat(FJ-P2C-005-F): differential oracle + metamorphic + adversarial validation for cache/keying

15 conformance tests:
- 5 oracle: determinism, sensitivity, hit/miss, strict/hardened separation,
  collision resistance (1540+ keys, 0 collisions)
- 4 metamorphic: restart invariance, f(x)!=f(y), f!=g, eviction correctness
- 6 adversarial: large program, uniform rejection, empty program, delimiter
  injection, streaming/owned agreement, persistence across reopen

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
